summary: Fixed three simplicity findings from the review cycle: (1) added 'simplify' to activePhases2 in run.mjs so simplify-phase costs appear in progress.md; (2) removed the speculative round argument from runPassFn() calls; (3) added result.reverted to the break condition in runSimplifyFixLoop to avoid re-dispatching the agent on already-reverted unchanged code, with a new behavioral test covering the reverted-early-exit path.
